commit.message:
fix: simplify page merge to position-based preservation (#314)

* fix: simplify page merge to position-based preservation

Replace title-matching logic with simpler position-based approach:
- Regenerate/refine outline preserves descriptions and images by page position
- If new outline has fewer pages, trailing pages are deleted
- If new outline has more pages, new pages are created as DRAFT
- Update warning message to inform users about page deletion

Changes:
- backend: Simplify _smart_merge_pages to position-based logic
- frontend: Update regenerate warning message (zh/en)
- tests: Rewrite unit tests for position-based scenarios
- e2e: Add mock tests for fewer/more pages and warning dialog

* feat: add lock page count option to prevent page reduction

Add checkbox in regenerate warning dialog to lock page count:
- When enabled, if new outline has fewer pages, pad with blank pages
- Preserves descriptions and images for all existing pages
- Frontend: Add checkbox to ConfirmDialog component
- Backend: Handle lock_page_count parameter in generate_outline_stream

* fix: correct checkbox value passing in ConfirmDialog hook

commit.message:
fix: use project's aspect ratio in image generation prompt (#313)

The image generation prompt hardcoded "16:9比例" regardless of the
user's aspect ratio setting. Now passes aspect_ratio through
generate_image_prompt() → get_image_generation_prompt() so the
prompt text matches the actual ratio used by image providers.

commit.message:
refactor: DRY prompts.py and organize into sections (#312)

* refactor: DRY prompts.py — extract shared helpers and constants

- _build_prompt(): centralizes files_xml prepending + logging
- _get_original_input(): extracts user input from project context (was duplicated 4x)
- _get_original_input_labeled(): labeled version for refinement prompts (was duplicated 2x)
- _get_previous_requirements_text(): formats modification history (was duplicated 2x)
- DETAIL_LEVEL_SPECS: shared constant (was duplicated 2x)
- _OUTLINE_JSON_FORMAT: shared JSON outline template (was duplicated 4x)

* refactor: organize prompts.py into 6 sections with clear dividers

Group functions by category and reorder:
1. Shared helpers & constants
2. Outline prompts (generate, parse, refine)
3. Description prompts (single, stream, split, refine)
4. Image generation prompts (generate, edit)
5. Image processing prompts (background, quality)
6. Content extraction prompts (text attrs, page content, layout, style)

* fix: correct functional differences introduced by refactoring

- _OUTLINE_JSON_FORMAT: use single braces (not escaped) since it's a
  plain string inserted into f-strings via variable interpolation
- get_outline_refinement_prompt: restore inline Chinese format example
  instead of shared English _OUTLINE_JSON_FORMAT constant
- get_page_description_prompt: restore original shorter 'concise' spec
  (differs from streaming version's more detailed description)

Verified: all 26 test cases now produce identical output vs main.

commit.message:
feat: streaming description generation with configurable extra fields (#299)

* feat: add streaming description generation with layout suggestions

- Add SSE endpoint POST /api/projects/{id}/generate/descriptions/stream
  that generates all page descriptions in a single AI call with incremental
  parsing and per-page SSE events
- Add layout suggestion output to both streaming and per-page description
  generation prompts (structure/layout only, no style/color)
- Add description_generation_mode setting (streaming/parallel) with
  streaming as default, configurable from Settings page
- Update frontend store to dispatch between streaming (SSE with render
  queue) and parallel (task polling) modes based on cached settings
- Display layout suggestions in DescriptionCard with separator and icon
- Add alembic migration for description_generation_mode column

* test: add E2E tests for streaming description generation

- Mock test: SSE streaming renders descriptions incrementally
- Mock test: layout suggestion displays when present in description_content
- Mock test: parallel mode dispatches to task-based endpoint
- Integration test: settings page shows generation mode toggle
- Integration test: description_generation_mode persists across save/reload
- Integration test: single page regeneration button is present

* fix: remove unused page_id_map variable

* fix: add description_requirements to streaming prompt

* feat: generalize layout_suggestion to configurable extra fields system

- Replace hardcoded layout_suggestion with dynamic extra_fields (Record<string, string>)
- Add description_extra_fields column to Settings (JSON array, default ["排版建议"])
- Generalize _parse_layout_suggestion → _parse_extra_fields in ai_service.py
- Add extra_fields param to prompt functions for dynamic field generation
- Add settings panel to DetailEditor toolbar (generation mode, detail level, extra fields)
- Move description_generation_mode from Settings page to DetailEditor panel
- DescriptionCard dynamically renders and edits extra fields
- Backward compatible: old layout_suggestion maps to extra_fields["排版建议"]
- Update E2E tests with extra_fields coverage

* fix: resolve strict mode violations in E2E tests

Use getByRole selectors to avoid ambiguous text matches.

* fix: use Layout icon for 排版-related extra fields, Tag for others

* fix: reduce description textarea height in edit dialog

* feat: pass extra fields to image generation and use checkbox UI for field selection

- Append extra_fields (排版建议, 配图建议, etc.) to desc_text before
  passing to image generation prompt, so user edits actually take effect
- Change extra fields UI from tags to checkboxes: users check/uncheck
  which fields to include, can still add new ones
- Available field pool stored in localStorage, active fields in DB

* feat: change default extra fields to 排版布局/视觉素材/视觉焦点

- Default fields: 排版布局 (LayoutGrid icon), 视觉素材 (Image icon),
  视觉焦点 (Focus icon), all enabled by default
- 视觉素材 has special prompt: only suggest material types (photos,
  icons, charts), not describe their visual style
- Each default field gets a dedicated lucide icon in DescriptionCard
- Extra fields are appended to desc_text for image generation prompt

* fix: replace checkbox UI with branded pill toggles for extra fields

Active fields use banana-colored rounded pills with border highlight,
inactive fields show muted with strikethrough. Matches the app's
button style used for generation mode and detail level toggles.

* fix: constrain markdown image size and limit description card height (#308)

* fix: constrain markdown preview image size and limit description card height

Images in markdown preview now capped at max-w-48/max-h-36 instead of max-w-full.
Description card content area limited to max-h-64 with overflow scroll.

* test: add E2E tests for markdown image size and card height constraints

* refactor: use data-testid for description card content area selector

* fix: use ultra-light scrollbar for description card content area

* fix: increase description card max height to 384px (max-h-96)

* fix: update E2E test for streaming outline generation

Outline generation changed from blocking task-poll (fullscreen Loading
indicator) to SSE streaming (incremental card rendering). The E2E test
was waiting for a "生成大纲中" loading indicator that no longer appears
during streaming. Now it detects the "生成中..." button state and waits
for streamed outline cards to appear.

* fix: restore Layout icon for 排版布局 field

* fix: use PAGE_END as sole page delimiter in streaming parser

The streaming description parser previously used `## ` headings to
split pages, which caused misalignment when AI output contained
multiple `## ` lines within a single page (e.g., subtitles on cover).
This led to page_index offset: earlier pages got partial content while
the last page was silently dropped.

Now `## ` only marks entry into the content zone (page_index -1 → 0);
all subsequent page boundaries are determined solely by `<!-- PAGE_END -->`.

Also:
- Remove _FIELD_INSTRUCTIONS special-casing for 视觉素材
- Use MarkdownTextarea for extra field editing (paste support, no upload btn)

* feat: add drag-and-drop reordering for extra field pills

* refactor: use @dnd-kit for extra field pill reordering

Replace native HTML5 drag-and-drop with @dnd-kit (same library used
by OutlineEditor) for smoother drag experience with visual feedback.

* fix: sync extraFieldNames order with availableFields after drag

* fix: remove transition from dragged pill for instant cursor tracking

* fix: stop extra field paste from inserting into main description

Extra field MarkdownTextareas shared the same onPaste/onFiles handlers
bound to the main description textarea, causing pasted images to appear
in the wrong field. Remove these handlers from extra fields since they
only need plain text paste (handled natively by MarkdownTextarea).

* feat: support image paste in each extra field independently

useImagePaste now uses refs for setContent/insertAtCursor so the
target field can be switched dynamically. DescriptionCard tracks
which field is focused and redirects paste/upload to that field.
MarkdownTextarea gains an onFocus prop to support this.

* fix: render extra field values with Markdown for image support

* fix: robust error recovery for streaming description generation

Backend: on exception, recover page statuses — pages with saved
descriptions are set to DESCRIPTION_GENERATED, others reset to DRAFT.
Project status updated accordingly.

Frontend: on SSE error or missing done event, syncProject() to fetch
real DB state instead of leaving skeleton screens stuck.

* refactor: use BEGIN/PAGE_END/END delimiters for streaming descriptions

Replace ## heading-based parsing with explicit delimiters:
- <!-- BEGIN --> marks the start of content (ignores AI preamble)
- <!-- PAGE_END --> splits pages
- <!-- END --> marks completion

Remove 页面标题 as a separate field — titles go inside page content.
This eliminates all heading-based parsing fragility.

* fix: detect incomplete streaming and warn user

After streaming loop ends, check for pages still in
GENERATING_DESCRIPTION status. Reset them to DRAFT (or keep
DESCRIPTION_GENERATED if they have old content) and send a warning
in the done event. Frontend displays the warning to the user.

* feat: support extra fields in markdown import/export

Export: append extra fields as 名称：值 lines after description text.
Import: detect and parse extra field lines from the end of description
sections, store them in description_content.extra_fields.
Both DetailEditor and OutlineEditor import handlers updated.

* fix: auto-insert blank line before markdown tables

remark-breaks causes tables without a preceding blank line to not
be parsed. Add preprocessing to ensure tables always have a blank
line before them.

* feat: add help tooltips for generation mode and extra fields

Add HelpCircle icon with hover tooltip explaining what each setting
does. Also hide detail level selector (effect not ideal, always
use default).

* fix: update tooltip text for generation mode and extra fields

* fix: add generation requirements mention to extra fields tooltip

* fix: refine prompt wording for concise mode and image generation

* fix: remove accidentally committed .venv symlink

* refactor: change default extra fields to 视觉元素/视觉焦点/排版布局

Rename 视觉素材→视觉元素, reorder defaults. Also make 页面文字 and
图片素材 explicit default sections in the streaming prompt, so AI
always outputs them without relying on extra fields config.

* fix: prevent deletion of preset extra fields

* feat: per-field toggle to control image prompt inclusion

Add image_prompt_fields to DescriptionContent — a list of extra field
names that should be passed to the image generation prompt. When
undefined, all fields are included (backward compat). When set,
only listed fields are appended.

UI: each extra field on the description card shows a small Image/
ImageOff toggle button to include/exclude it from image generation.

* fix: use check/square icons for image prompt toggle

* fix: include image_prompt_fields in memo comparator for instant toggle

* feat: control which extra fields are passed to image generation

Add image_prompt_extra_fields global setting (stored in DB) to control
which extra fields are included in the image generation prompt.

- Backend: new Settings column + migration, task_manager filters
  fields based on setting
- Frontend: small image icon on each active pill, click to toggle
  whether the field is passed to image generation (yellow = included,
  gray = excluded)

* feat: add speaker notes preset field and image prompt tooltips

- Add 演讲者备注 as a preset extra field (enabled by default, excluded
  from image generation by default)
- Add hover tooltip on the image icon explaining its effect in
  user-friendly language (no technical jargon like "文生图")
- Update PRESET_EXTRA_FIELDS to include all 4 preset fields

* fix: remove .venv symlink from tracking

* fix: relax status check for description generation and show image prompt indicator on cards

- Replace status whitelist with `not project.pages` check so description
  generation works regardless of project status (e.g. stuck GENERATING_IMAGES)
- Show ImageOff icon with hover tooltip on extra fields not included in
  image generation prompt

* fix: pass onFocus to mock MarkdownTextarea in unit test

The image paste test needs onFocus to properly set up the paste target
ref, which was broken after adding multi-field focus switching.

* refactor: DRY prompts.py — extract shared helpers and constants

- _build_prompt(): centralizes files_xml prepending + logging
- _get_original_input(): extracts user input from project context (was duplicated 4x)
- _get_original_input_labeled(): labeled version for refinement prompts (was duplicated 2x)
- _get_previous_requirements_text(): formats modification history (was duplicated 2x)
- DETAIL_LEVEL_SPECS: shared constant (was duplicated 2x)
- _OUTLINE_JSON_FORMAT: shared JSON outline template (was duplicated 4x)

* refactor: organize prompts.py into 6 sections with clear dividers

Group functions by category and reorder:
1. Shared helpers & constants
2. Outline prompts (generate, parse, refine)
3. Description prompts (single, stream, split, refine)
4. Image generation prompts (generate, edit)
5. Image processing prompts (background, quality)
6. Content extraction prompts (text attrs, page content, layout, style)

* Revert "refactor: organize prompts.py into 6 sections with clear dividers"

This reverts commit 364a33d73e49a468cf0fd8be36acd00fd76e9fe6.

* Revert "refactor: DRY prompts.py — extract shared helpers and constants"

This reverts commit 1c862b434782f3a3f5310a58f71705b4756fb9b8.

* fix: address code review feedback

- Simplify redundant ternary in setDetailLevel (always 'default')
- Add logger.warning to broad except in _get_extra_field_names
- Use newline instead of space for multi-line extra field joining

* fix: use context-appropriate structural marker examples in requirements

_format_requirements now takes a context parameter ("outline" or
"description") so the example references the correct markers:
- outline: '## Title' heading delimiters
- description: '页面文字：', '<!-- PAGE_END -->' etc.

* fix: include user requirements in image generation design guidelines

Replace ## heading-based parsing with explicit delimiters:
- <!-- BEGIN --> marks the start of content (ignores AI preamble)
- <!-- PAGE_END --> splits pages
- <!-- END --> marks completion

Remove 页面标题 as a separate field — titles go inside page content.
This eliminates all heading-based parsing fragility.

* fix: detect incomplete streaming and warn user

After streaming loop ends, check for pages still in
GENERATING_DESCRIPTION status. Reset them to DRAFT (or keep
DESCRIPTION_GENERATED if they have old content) and send a warning
in the done event. Frontend displays the warning to the user.

* feat: support extra fields in markdown import/export

Export: append extra fields as 名称：值 lines after description text.
Import: detect and parse extra field lines from the end of description
sections, store them in description_content.extra_fields.
Both DetailEditor and OutlineEditor import handlers updated.

* fix: auto-insert blank line before markdown tables

remark-breaks causes tables without a preceding blank line to not
be parsed. Add preprocessing to ensure tables always have a blank
line before them.

* feat: add help tooltips for generation mode and extra fields

Add HelpCircle icon with hover tooltip explaining what each setting
does. Also hide detail level selector (effect not ideal, always
use default).

* fix: update tooltip text for generation mode and extra fields

* fix: add generation requirements mention to extra fields tooltip

* fix: refine prompt wording for concise mode and image generation

* fix: remove accidentally committed .venv symlink

* refactor: change default extra fields to 视觉元素/视觉焦点/排版布局

Rename 视觉素材→视觉元素, reorder defaults. Also make 页面文字 and
图片素材 explicit default sections in the streaming prompt, so AI
always outputs them without relying on extra fields config.

* fix: prevent deletion of preset extra fields

* feat: per-field toggle to control image prompt inclusion

Add image_prompt_fields to DescriptionContent — a list of extra field
names that should be passed to the image generation prompt. When
undefined, all fields are included (backward compat). When set,
only listed fields are appended.

UI: each extra field on the description card shows a small Image/
ImageOff toggle button to include/exclude it from image generation.

* fix: use check/square icons for image prompt toggle

* fix: include image_prompt_fields in memo comparator for instant toggle

* feat: control which extra fields are passed to image generation

Add image_prompt_extra_fields global setting (stored in DB) to control
which extra fields are included in the image generation prompt.

- Backend: new Settings column + migration, task_manager filters
  fields based on setting
- Frontend: small image icon on each active pill, click to toggle
  whether the field is passed to image generation (yellow = included,
  gray = excluded)

* feat: add speaker notes preset field and image prompt tooltips

- Add 演讲者备注 as a preset extra field (enabled by default, excluded
  from image generation by default)
- Add hover tooltip on the image icon explaining its effect in
  user-friendly language (no technical jargon like "文生图")
- Update PRESET_EXTRA_FIELDS to include all 4 preset fields

* fix: remove .venv symlink from tracking

* fix: relax status check for description generation and show image prompt indicator on cards

- Replace status whitelist with `not project.pages` check so description
  generation works regardless of project status (e.g. stuck GENERATING_IMAGES)
- Show ImageOff icon with hover tooltip on extra fields not included in
  image generation prompt

* fix: pass onFocus to mock MarkdownTextarea in unit test

The image paste test needs onFocus to properly set up the paste target
ref, which was broken after adding multi-field focus switching.

* refactor: DRY prompts.py — extract shared helpers and constants

- _build_prompt(): centralizes files_xml prepending + logging
- _get_original_input(): extracts user input from project context (was duplicated 4x)
- _get_original_input_labeled(): labeled version for refinement prompts (was duplicated 2x)
- _get_previous_requirements_text(): formats modification history (was duplicated 2x)
- DETAIL_LEVEL_SPECS: shared constant (was duplicated 2x)
- _OUTLINE_JSON_FORMAT: shared JSON outline template (was duplicated 4x)

* refactor: organize prompts.py into 6 sections with clear dividers

Group functions by category and reorder:
1. Shared helpers & constants
2. Outline prompts (generate, parse, refine)
3. Description prompts (single, stream, split, refine)
4. Image generation prompts (generate, edit)
5. Image processing prompts (background, quality)
6. Content extraction prompts (text attrs, page content, layout, style)

* Revert "refactor: organize prompts.py into 6 sections with clear dividers"

This reverts commit 364a33d73e49a468cf0fd8be36acd00fd76e9fe6.

* Revert "refactor: DRY prompts.py — extract shared helpers and constants"

This reverts commit 1c862b434782f3a3f5310a58f71705b4756fb9b8.

* fix: address code review feedback

- Simplify redundant ternary in setDetailLevel (always 'default')
- Add logger.warning to broad except in _get_extra_field_names
- Use newline instead of space for multi-line extra field joining

* fix: use context-appropriate structural marker examples in requirements

_format_requirements now takes a context parameter ("outline" or
"description") so the example references the correct markers:
- outline: '## Title' heading delimiters
- description: '页面文字：', '<!-- PAGE_END -->' etc.

* fix: include user requirements in image generation design guidelines

commit.message:
feat: preset capsules, MarkdownTextarea for requirements, XML-wrapped prompts (#304)

* feat: add preset capsule system for generation requirements

Add reusable PresetCapsules component with system presets (hardcoded per
locale) and user custom presets (localStorage). System presets provide
common prompt shortcuts (page limits, concise style, etc.) while users
can add/delete their own. Clicking a capsule appends the prompt text to
the requirements textarea. Integrated into both OutlineEditor and
DetailEditor.

Closes #302

* test: add E2E tests for preset capsule system

13 tests covering:
- Mock: system preset display, click-to-append, tooltip, custom
  preset add/delete/cancel, disabled state, independence between
  outline and description presets
- Integration: preset click saves to backend, custom presets persist
  in localStorage across navigations

* refactor: address review feedback

- Extract cancel logic into handleCancelAdd callback (DRY)
- Add aria-label to delete preset button (accessibility)
- Extract shared mock route helper in E2E tests (DRY)
- Fix misleading comment about save trigger in integration test

* fix: allow requirements textarea to be vertically resized

Change resize-none to resize-y and increase container maxHeight from
280px to 600px so users can drag the textarea handle to adjust height.

* refactor: redesign presets with 3 practical sets + allow textarea resize

Replace generic presets with 3 purpose-driven preset sets:
1. Zen Minimal (outline+desc): Jobs-style one-message-per-page
2. SlideDocs (outline+desc): faithful-to-source comprehensive docs
3. Smart Layout (desc only): auto-suggest optimal layout per content

Also change textarea from resize-none to resize-y with increased
container maxHeight (600px) to allow manual height adjustment.

* refactor: wrap requirements with XML tags in prompts

Use <requirements> XML tags instead of markdown heading for better
structured parsing by LLMs.

* refactor: use modal dialog for adding custom presets

Replace inline form with Modal component for a cleaner UX. The modal
provides labeled fields, a multi-line textarea for prompt content, and
proper focus management with animation.

* fix: use concrete examples as placeholder text in preset modal

* refactor: wrap generation requirements in XML tags with priority note

Use <user_requirements> XML tags instead of markdown heading, and add
a note that these requirements take precedence over other instructions
while preserving necessary output formatting.

* fix: clarify priority note wording in requirements prompt

Make it clear that user requirements override everything except the
required output format, not the other way around.

* fix: cap capsule width and remove hover underline

- Add max-w-[200px] + truncate to prevent capsules from stretching
- Remove hover:underline on user preset name button

* chore: remove system presets and update E2E tests

Clear system preset arrays (to be filled by user later), remove all
system-preset-specific tests, update remaining tests accordingly.

* fix: clarify that requirements apply to content, not format markers

When users write requirements like "禁止输出#符号", the model would
conflict with the markdown heading output format. Make the priority
note explicit: requirements govern generated content, structural
markers (markdown headings, JSON) are exempt.

* fix: show warning when outline generation produces zero pages

Treat zero pages the same as incomplete generation — both now trigger
the "generateIncomplete" warning toast instead of silently succeeding.

* fix: add concrete example to requirements priority note

Use the '#' symbol case as an example: user requirements like "no #"
apply to page content only, while '## Title' structural delimiters
between pages must still be used.

* feat: enable image paste in requirements textarea

- Connect useImagePaste hook to requirements MarkdownTextarea in both
  OutlineEditor and DetailEditor, allowing image paste/drop
- Fix E2E test flakiness: use keyboard.insertText() instead of
  pressSequentially() to avoid CJK character garbling under parallel
  execution

* fix: focus ring clipped by overflow-hidden and flaky E2E tests

- Add ring-inset to requirements MarkdownTextarea so focus ring renders
  inside the border, avoiding clipping by the collapsible container's
  overflow-hidden
- Use editor.focus() instead of editor.click() in E2E clearAndType
  helper to avoid flaky pointer-interception errors during animations

fix: remove unused eslint-disable directives in History.tsx

The pagination refactor made the exhaustive-deps suppression comments
unnecessary, causing CI lint to fail with 3 errors.

feat: add page size selector to history pagination

Stored in localStorage, default 5, options 5/10/20.
Always show pagination when projects exist.

feat: add pagination to history page (5 per page) (#297)

* feat: add pagination to history page (15 projects per page)

Users reported slow loading when accessing the history page with many
projects. Add server-side pagination with a total count, a reusable
Pagination component, and update History.tsx to load 15 projects per
page with page navigation controls.

* test: add E2E tests for history page pagination

Mock tests cover: no pagination for few projects, pagination visibility,
page navigation, prev/next buttons, and API params verification.
Integration test creates 18 real projects to verify pagination with
actual backend data.

* fix: address review comments

- Fix double-fetch after deletion by conditionally calling loadProjects
- Remove redundant onClick guards in Pagination (disabled handles it)
- Parallelize test cleanup with Promise.all

* fix: improve pagination for small page counts

Show all page numbers when totalPages <= 5 to avoid awkward ellipsis.
Revert unstable hook deps (useT returns new ref each render).

* chore: reduce page size from 15 to 5 for faster loading

Users accessing the history page externally experience slow loading
due to many project preview images. Reducing from 15 to 5 items per
page significantly cuts image payload per page load.

commit.message:
fix: preserve lazyllm vendor name in global provider config (#306)

* fix: preserve lazyllm vendor name in ai_provider_format

Previously, the frontend converted vendor names (e.g., "doubao") to
generic "lazyllm" on save, losing the vendor info. The backend then
defaulted to hardcoded 'deepseek' for text and 'doubao' for image,
causing API key lookups to fail for any other vendor.

Now the specific vendor name is stored directly in ai_provider_format.
The backend normalizes it to 'lazyllm' format internally while using
the vendor name as the default source for all model types.

* test: add E2E tests for lazyllm global vendor fix

Mock tests: verify vendor name sent directly on save, correct dropdown
display on load, backward compat for legacy "lazyllm" format.

Integration tests: save/reload persistence, API verification, reset.

* style: move LAZYLLM_VENDORS import to top of settings controller

commit.message:
feat: add aspect ratio selector to material generation modal (#301)

* feat: add aspect ratio selector to material generation modal

Allow users to choose the output aspect ratio when generating materials,
instead of silently inheriting the project's default. The selector shows
all available ratios (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 9:16, etc.) and defaults to the
current project's ratio or 16:9 for global materials.

* fix: sync aspect ratio on modal open; use waitForResponse in E2E test

- Add useEffect to reset aspectRatio state when modal opens, ensuring
  new sessions reflect the latest project settings (fixes race condition
  when project data loads after component mounts)
- Replace waitForTimeout with waitForResponse in E2E test for reliability

* fix: address review comments - backend validation, useEffect deps, type safety

- Add backend whitelist validation for aspect_ratio to prevent prompt injection

fix: restore .env defaults for all settings fields on reset (#293)

* fix: restore .env defaults for text_model/image_model/format on settings reset

_sync_settings_to_config() only restored api_key/api_base to .env defaults
when DB fields were NULL, but skipped text_model, image_model, and
ai_provider_format. After reset, app.config retained stale values from the
previous configuration, causing wrong model/provider to be used.

stale values instead of falling back to .env defaults.

app.config values, enabling E2E tests to verify internal config state.

Three integration tests using the new /api/settings/active-config endpoint:
1. Reset after custom save restores app.config to .env defaults
2. Save after reset still uses .env defaults (double-save scenario)
3. API response and app.config agree after reset

commit.message:
feat: streaming outline generation with SSE and animated rendering (#282)

* feat(backend): add SSE streaming endpoint for outline generation

- Add generate_text_stream() to TextProvider base class with streaming support for GenAI and OpenAI providers
- Add markdown-format prompt templates for outline generation (simpler to parse incrementally than JSON)
- Add generate_outline_stream() generator in ai_service that parses markdown line-by-line and yields pages
- Add POST /api/projects/{id}/generate/outline/stream SSE endpoint with page/done/error events
- Wrap SSE generator in app_context() to prevent RuntimeError on db operations

* feat(frontend): streaming outline UI with animated card rendering

- Add generateOutlineStream() SSE client using fetch + ReadableStream
- Add isOutlineStreaming state and generateOutlineStream action to Zustand store
- Update OutlineEditor to render cards incrementally during streaming with slide-in-up animation
- Add slide-in-up keyframe animation to tailwind config

* test(e2e): add streaming outline Playwright tests

- Mock tests: SSE card rendering, error handling, button state during streaming
- Integration test (skipped in CI): real backend streaming with persistence verification

* fix: align streaming outline prompt with original JSON prompt

Match the original prompt's structure: same opening line, Simple format
listed before Part-based, and include "don't include any other text".

* feat: detect incomplete streaming outline via END marker

- Add <!-- END --> instruction to all 3 markdown prompts
- Backend parser tracks END marker, yields completion sentinel
- Controller passes complete flag in SSE done event
- Frontend shows warning toast when stream is incomplete

* fix: add fade-out transition to streaming skeleton card

Instead of abruptly vanishing when streaming ends, the skeleton card
now fades out over 300ms for a smoother visual experience.

* fix: smooth fade-out for streaming skeleton card

Wrap skeleton in an outer div with opacity transition so it fades out
over 1s when streaming ends, instead of vanishing abruptly. The inner
animate-pulse keeps running independently without interfering.

* fix: E2E test wait for regenerate button instead of stale locator

The generate button locator stopped matching during streaming (text
changed to "生成中..."), causing not.toHaveText to pass immediately.
Wait for the "Regenerate" button to appear instead.

* fix: address review comments — buffer parsing, error handling, test assertions

- ai_service: process remaining buffer with full line-by-line logic
  (handle ## and # lines, not just - and END marker)
- project_controller: log rollback failures instead of silently
  swallowing; return generic error message instead of raw exception
- E2E: assert button disabled state and re-enable on completion,
  remove waitForTimeout in favor of Playwright assertions

* fix: correct return type of generateOutlineStream in interface

When siliconflow S3 returns application/octet-stream instead of image/*,
LazyLLM's internal validator throws ModuleExecutionError. Catch this error,
extract the URL from the message, and download the image directly via requests.

Also add LAZYLLM_ALLOW_INTERNAL_NETWORK=True to .env.example.

fix: use get_config().UPLOAD_FOLDER for /files/ path resolution in ai_service (#288)

* fix: use get_config().UPLOAD_FOLDER instead of os.environ for path resolution

os.environ.get('UPLOAD_FOLDER', '') always returned empty string since
UPLOAD_FOLDER is set in Flask app.config, not as an environment variable.
This caused material image paths in page descriptions to resolve incorrectly
during image generation.

Closes #287

* test: add E2E test for UPLOAD_FOLDER path resolution (#287)

Verifies that material images referenced in page descriptions via /files/
paths are correctly resolved during image generation, confirming the fix
for get_config().UPLOAD_FOLDER usage.

* test: address review feedback — remove unused formData, improve log check precision

fix: load per-model API credentials on startup (#284) (#285)

* fix: load per-model API credentials on startup

_load_settings_to_config() was missing per-model API credentials
(text_api_key, text_api_base_url, image_api_key, etc.), causing
requests to fail after backend restart until settings were re-saved.

Aligns startup loading with _sync_settings_to_config() save logic.

Closes #284

* test: add E2E test for per-model credentials startup loading (#284)

Verifies that per-model API credentials (text_api_base_url, text_api_key,
etc.) are loaded into app.config on backend restart by checking startup
logs and settings page persistence.

* refactor: use dynamic paths in E2E test for portability

Replace hardcoded worktree path with path.resolve(__dirname) and use
process.pid in log filename to avoid conflicts.

commit.message:
fix: resolve badge status race condition after image generation (#279)

* fix: resolve badge status race condition after image generation

Two issues caused badges to intermittently show "DESCRIPTION_GENERATED"
instead of "COMPLETED" after image generation:

1. Concurrent syncProject calls (from polling + debouncedUpdatePage) could
   overwrite store with stale data. Added request counter to discard
   outdated responses.

2. Pages not yet picked up by the thread pool (still DESCRIPTION_GENERATED)
   were prematurely released from pageGeneratingTasks. Changed release
   condition to only release COMPLETED or FAILED pages.

* refactor: simplify race condition fix — guard instead of counter

Replace syncRequestId counter with a simple guard: skip syncProject
in debouncedUpdatePage when image generation is active (poll already
syncs every 2s). Same effect, less code.

commit.message:
fix: preserve original aspect ratio in PPT renovation (#277)

* fix: preserve original aspect ratio when importing PPT for renovation

PPT renovation was always using the default 16:9 aspect ratio regardless
of the imported file's actual dimensions. Now extracts page dimensions
from the first page of the PDF (via PyMuPDF or pdf2image fallback) and
sets the project's image_aspect_ratio accordingly.

* test: add E2E tests for renovation aspect ratio preservation

Integration tests verify that:
- 4:3 PDF uploads get 4:3 as project aspect ratio
- 16:9 PDF uploads get 16:9 as project aspect ratio
- SlidePreview UI reflects the correct aspect ratio

* refactor: extract PDF dimensions before render loop, strengthen E2E assertion

Address Gemini review comments:
- Move first-page dimension extraction before the render loop (PyMuPDF)
- Use border-banana-500 class check for aspect ratio button selection state

* fix: remove premature db.session.commit() to preserve transaction atomicity

The aspect ratio update should be committed together with page creation
in the same transaction, not separately.

commit.message:
fix: eliminate settings DB write side-effects, ensure .env fallback for unset fields (#260)

* fix: make get_settings() a pure read without DB write side-effects

Previously, get_settings() would persist .env defaults into the
database on every read, causing user-modified .env values to be
ignored after the first access (the old value was already committed).

Now, .env defaults are merged in memory only. The settings object
is expunged from the session when merging is needed, preventing
SQLAlchemy from flushing the changes. Only explicit save operations
(from the Settings UI) write to the database.

Fixes #254

Signed-off-by: haosenwang1018 <haosenwang1018@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: use make_transient instead of expunge in get_settings()

Addresses Gemini review: make_transient fully detaches the object
from the session, preventing accidental DB writes if another part
of the request cycle calls db.session.commit().

* fix: move .env default merging to to_dict() instead of detaching ORM object

Addresses Gemini review:
- Critical: make_transient broke update/reset paths; now get_settings()
  returns a clean session-attached object, to_dict() merges defaults
- High/Medium: E2E test uses relative path, no lsof, escapes SQL values

* fix: merge .env default for lazyllm_api_keys in to_dict()

* fix: address review - clarify docstring, use quote() in E2E test

* fix: make settings columns nullable so .env defaults always apply for unset fields

- Make ai_provider_format, image_resolution, image_aspect_ratio,
  max_description_workers, max_image_workers, output_language nullable
- Initial creation stores empty record (all NULL) instead of .env values
- Reset sets fields to NULL instead of .env values
- Add .env fallback in _load_settings_to_config and _sync_settings_to_config
- Expand E2E tests: save, reset, NULL fallback scenarios

---------

Signed-off-by: haosenwang1018 <haosenwang1018@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: haosenwang1018 <haosenwang1018@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Anion <1005128408@qq.com>

* feat: add import outline/description from Markdown with reversible format

Redesign export format to preserve `part` (chapter) and `layout_suggestion`
fields via blockquote metadata lines. Add corresponding import functions
that parse the Markdown back into structured data, updating existing pages
by order and appending new pages as needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: change import to append-only mode, no data overwrite

Import always adds new pages instead of overwriting existing ones.
Removes confirmation dialogs since no data loss is possible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add Playwright E2E test for markdown import feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review — sanitize imports, parallelize addPage, robust parsing

- Strip HTML tags from parsed markdown fields to prevent stored XSS
- Use Promise.all() for parallel addPage calls instead of sequential loop
- Fix description parser to only strip metadata at section boundaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use const for non-reassigned array (lint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: save description_content in create_page endpoint

The create_page endpoint only saved outline_content but ignored
description_content from the request body, causing imported
descriptions to be lost.

* feat: unified markdown export/import with outline + description

Merge outline and description into a single markdown file using
**大纲要点：** and **页面描述：** section markers. Both OutlineEditor
and DetailEditor now export/import the same unified format.
Backward-compatible with legacy marker-less format.

* feat: separate export variants (outline-only, description-only, full)

- OutlineEditor: "导出大纲" exports outline only, "导入" imports any format
- DetailEditor: "导出描述" exports description only, "导出大纲+描述" exports full
- Both import buttons handle all formats dynamically
- Parser now handles single-marker formats (outline-only or description-only)

* fix: legacy parser excludes bullet lines from description text

* fix: differentiate export filenames by type (大纲/描述/项目)

* fix: use max order_index for import append position

---------

Co-authored-by: clawdbot001 <clawdbot001@openclaw.ai>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: restructure CI/CD pipeline with nightly and release E2E gates (#251)

* feat: add semver tag trigger for Docker publish and GitHub Release

- Add `push: tags: v*.*.*` trigger to docker-publish workflow so semver
  metadata patterns actually activate on version tags
- Tag pushes also set `latest` Docker tag
- Create GitHub Release with auto-generated notes on tag push
- Add `npm run release` convenience script (git push --follow-tags)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: switch to release-triggered Docker publish

- Remove workflow_run trigger (no more auto-publish on main merge)
- Trigger on GitHub Release publish + manual workflow_dispatch
- Add sync-version job to auto-update package.json and pyproject.toml
- Reserve commented placeholder for binary artifact builds
- Remove npm release script (replaced by gh release create)

* fix: gate latest Docker tag to release events and add permissions block

* feat: switch to workflow_dispatch release flow

Test → Build Docker → Create Release → Sync Version
Ensures CI passes before any release is published.

* fix: reorder jobs so version bump precedes tag and Docker build

test → sync-version → create-release → build-and-push

* fix: harden release workflow with version validation and safe interpolation

- Add validate job to enforce vX.Y.Z format before running anything
- Use env vars instead of direct ${{ inputs.version }} in shell run blocks
- Fix commented-out build-binaries: move needs to job level

* fix: add idempotency guards and race condition handling

- Fail early if version tag already exists (prevents duplicate releases)
- Add git pull --rebase before push in sync-version (handles race condition)
- Fix build-binaries needs to depend on create-release only

* refactor: restructure PR and push-to-main CI pipelines

- PR quick check: add backend/frontend unit tests alongside lint + build
- Push-to-main: keep unit + integration tests, remove Docker E2E and
  security scan (moved to nightly)

* feat: add nightly workflow with E2E tests and Docker image push

- Runs daily at 03:00 UTC + manual workflow_dispatch
- Builds Docker, runs full E2E (Playwright) + security scan
- Pushes nightly-tagged images to Docker Hub on success

* feat: add E2E gate to release workflow

- Insert Docker-based E2E test between pre-release tests and version sync
- E2E failure blocks release creation and image push

* feat: add manual approval gate before release publish

Requires 'release' environment approval after E2E passes,
giving maintainer time to manually verify new features before
version bump and image push proceed.

commit.message:
fix: service test vendor format mapping and per-model source clearing (#240)

* fix: service test sends raw vendor name instead of lazyllm format

handleServiceTest sent formData.ai_provider_format directly (e.g. "deepseek")
to the backend test endpoint, which only accepts "gemini"/"openai"/"lazyllm".
This caused the backend to fall back to gemini and require GOOGLE_API_KEY.

Apply the same isLazyllmVendor mapping that handleSave already uses.

* fix: clear per-model source override when using default config in service test

Frontend now always sends per-model source values (even empty) so backend
can distinguish "use default" from "not specified". Backend pops config key
when source is empty, allowing proper fallback to global provider config.

feat: add access code verification for public deployments (#245)

* feat: add access code protection for public deployments

When ACCESS_CODE is set in .env, users must enter the code before
accessing the app. The code is stored in localStorage after verification.
Closes #149

* test: add E2E tests for access code guard

* fix: address Gemini review - backend enforcement, fail-closed, error handling

- Add before_request middleware to enforce access code on all /api/ routes
- Send X-Access-Code header from frontend on every API request
- Use hmac.compare_digest to prevent timing attacks
- Fail-closed: show prompt (not pass) when backend is unreachable
- Differentiate 403 (wrong code) from network errors in UI
- Handle explicit valid:false response

* fix: use hmac.compare_digest in middleware, clean localStorage on error

commit.message:
chore: remove nightly E2E workflow

Full E2E tests now run in ci-test.yml on every push to main,
making the separate nightly workflow redundant.

fix: restore full E2E test in CI and increase image generation timeout

Revert to running the full UI E2E test (not just quick validation).
Increase image generation wait from 7min to 15min to handle Gemini API
retries on RemoteProtocolError disconnects.

fix: run only quick E2E test in CI, leave full test for nightly

The full AI-dependent E2E test (10-20 min) is unreliable in CI due to
Gemini API timeouts. Run only the quick UI validation test in CI;
the full flow test already runs in the nightly-e2e workflow.

fix: override Chinese PyPI mirror in CI with default PyPI

pyproject.toml uses pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn which returns 403
from GitHub Actions runners outside China.

fix: default per-model source to empty so global provider is used

When TEXT_MODEL_SOURCE/IMAGE_MODEL_SOURCE env vars are absent,
config.py defaulted to 'deepseek'/'doubao', causing LazyLLM provider
to be used instead of the global AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT (gemini) in CI.

releases.name: v0.4.0
releases.body:
Banana Slides v0.4.0 brings internationalization, dark mode, a redesigned editor experience, and dozens of quality-of-life improvements.

---

## Highlights

### ✏️ New Editor Experience

- **MarkdownTextarea** — A brand-new rich editing component with inline chips, formatting toolbar, image preview, and markdown-to-chips conversion on paste. Now user can paste images whereever in homepage, outline editor or description cards and they will be processed instantly.
- **OutlineEditor Redesign** — Split-view layout: left panel for editing raw outline/description text, right collapsible drawer for structured outline cards.
- **Glassmorphism UI** — Modal and MaterialGeneratorModal redesigned with a modern glassmorphism aesthetic.

### 🧮 LaTeX & Image Paste

- Inline (`$...$`) and block (`$$...$$`) LaTeX formula rendering via KaTeX in all Markdown views.
- Paste images directly from clipboard in description editors — they are auto-uploaded as materials and inserted as markdown image links.
- Uploaded images now get **AI-generated captions** (Gemini / OpenAI) used as alt text.

### 🖼️ Material Center

A dedicated Material Center modal for browsing, filtering by project, batch selecting, bulk downloading (as zip), uploading, deleting, and previewing materials.

### ⚡ Performance

Frontend image loading optimized with compressed JPG thumbnails (`cached_image_path`). Originals are preserved for export quality.

### 🌍 Internationalization & Dark Mode

Full Chinese/English bilingual support powered by i18next, with light / dark / system theme switching. Every component has been adapted for dark mode.

---

## Features

- **i18n + Dark Mode**  (#196)
- **MarkdownTextarea, OutlineEditor redesign, glassmorphism UI** (#206)
- **LaTeX rendering, image paste, and AI captions** (#203)
- **Material Center and Help Modal** — Paginated onboarding guide, auto-shown on first visit (#53)
- **Image cache optimization** — Thumbnail generation for faster frontend loading (#151)
- **Export quality assurance** — "Allow partial export" toggle (default off), fail-fast with detailed error messages and help text (#190)
- **Settings service testing** — One-click connectivity tests for Baidu OCR, text model, caption model, image generation, and MinerU PDF parsing; supports testing unsaved settings before saving
- **Editable outline & description in SlidePreview** — Edit title, points, and description directly in the preview modal
- **Export outline & description to Markdown**
- **Manual chapter (part) editing** in outline (#194)
- **AI reasoning mode** — Independent enable_reasoning toggles for text and image generation; Vertex `thinking_budget` support (#160)
- **Resolution mismatch detection** — Warning dialog when image generation resolution doesn't match settings; OpenAI `extra_body` params for resolution control
- **Docker multi-arch** — amd64 + arm64 builds
- **Pre-built Docker image deployment** option
- **PPTX metadata** — Author and date metadata in exported files

## Bug Fixes

- **Export directory not created** — Relative path caused PDF/PPTX export to fail with 500 (#201)
- **Reference files not available during generation** — Files were associated after AI generation completed; now associated before (#201)
- **Image generation page data mismatch** — Filtered page_ids caused outline data to be zipped with wrong pages (#201)
- **Stale closure in task polling** — Switching projects caused polls to query the wrong project (#201)
- **Infinite polling on description generation failure** — Added retry limit (#201)
- **Path traversal vulnerability** — Export filenames and `/files/` paths sanitized with `secure_filename` / `os.path.abspath` (#201, #206)
- **Export path double-join** — `get_absolute_path()` wrapped an already-absolute path, causing 500
- **Memory leak** — Object URLs not revoked in image previews (#201)
- **Description generation race condition** — Now uses API response data directly instead of reading from store
- **Database session staleness** — Expire session before export to prevent stale reads (#183)
- **Baidu OCR config** — Read API key from Flask config (database settings) instead of only environment variables (#190)
- **Silent error swallowing** — MinerU / Baidu OCR extraction failures now propagate to frontend (#190)
- **Image path sync** — Added retry mechanism in `pollImageTask`
- **Batch delete** — Use `Promise.allSettled` to handle partial failures (#201)

## Improvements

- Hover tooltip with format examples for outline/description creation tabs (#202)
- HTTP error codes (503, 500, 429, etc.) show user-friendly localized messages (#202)
- Modal: always show close button + Escape key support (#202)
- Toast: new warning type, improved stacking, no header overlap (#202)
- Stale project IDs silently cleaned from localStorage (#202)
- Removed intrusive "service test tip" toast on first project creation (#202)
- `PORT` renamed to `BACKEND_PORT` for consistency
- Default text model updated to `gemini-3-flash-preview`

## Infrastructure

- GitHub Actions workflow for automatic README Chinese → English translation
- E2E tests adapted for i18n (`locale=zh-CN`)
- Test fixtures updated for open-source codebase (#204)
- Docker: `IN_DOCKER=1` set in backend Dockerfile

## New Contributors
* @VVIP1024 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/pull/160
* @uthanw made their first contribution in https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/pull/151
* @Rock-ql made their first contribution in https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/pull/53

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0

readme_html:
在几分钟内从想法到演示文稿，无需繁琐排版、口头提出修改，迈向真正的"Vibe PPT"

✨ 项目缘起

你是否也曾陷入这样的困境：明天就要汇报，但PPT还是一片空白；脑中有无数精彩的想法，却被繁琐的排版和设计消磨掉所有热情？

我(们)渴望能快速创作出既专业又具设计感的演示文稿，传统的AI PPT生成app，虽然大体满足“快”这一需求，却还存在以下问题：

  • 1️⃣只能选择预设模版，无法灵活调整风格
  • 2️⃣自由度低，多轮改动难以进行
  • 3️⃣成品观感相似，同质化严重
  • 4️⃣素材质量较低，缺乏针对性
  • 5️⃣图文排版割裂，设计感差

以上这些缺陷，让传统的AI ppt生成器难以同时满足我们“快”和“美”的两大PPT制作需求。即使自称Vibe PPT，但是在我的眼中还远不够“Vibe”。

但是，nano banana🍌模型的出现让一切有了转机。我尝试使用🍌pro进行ppt页面生成，发现生成的结果无论是质量、美感还是一致性，都做的非常好，且几乎能精确渲染prompt要求的所有文字+遵循参考图的风格。那为什么不基于🍌pro，做一个原生的"Vibe PPT"应用呢？

👨‍💻 适用场景

  1. 小白：零门槛快速生成美观PPT，无需设计经验，减少模板选择烦恼
  2. PPT专业人士：参考AI生成的布局和图文元素组合，快速获取设计灵感
  3. 教育工作者：将教学内容快速转换为配图教案PPT，提升课堂效果
  4. 学生：快速完成作业Pre，把精力专注于内容而非排版美化
  5. 职场人士：商业提案、产品介绍快速可视化，多场景快速适配

🎨 结果案例
软件开发最佳实践 DeepSeek-V3.2技术展示
预制菜智能产线装备研发和产业化 钱的演变：从贝壳到纸币的旅程

更多可见 使用案例

🎯 功能介绍

1. 灵活多样的创作路径

支持想法、大纲、页面描述三种起步方式，满足不同创作习惯。

  • 一句话生成：输入一个主题，AI 自动生成结构清晰的大纲和逐页内容描述。
  • 自然语言编辑：支持以 Vibe 形式口头修改大纲或描述（如"把第三页改成案例分析"），AI 实时响应调整。
  • 大纲/描述模式：既可一键批量生成，也可手动调整细节。

2. 强大的素材解析能力

  • 多格式支持：上传 PDF/Docx/MD/Txt 等文件，后台自动解析内容。
  • 智能提取：自动识别文本中的关键点、图片链接和图表信息，为生成提供丰富素材。
  • 风格参考：支持上传参考图片或模板，定制 PPT 风格。

3. "Vibe" 式自然语言修改

不再受限于复杂的菜单按钮，直接通过自然语言下达修改指令。

  • 局部重绘：对不满意的区域进行口头式修改（如"把这个图换成饼图"）。
  • 整页优化：基于 nano banana pro🍌 生成高清、风格统一的页面。

4. 开箱即用的格式导出

  • 多格式支持：一键导出标准 PPTX 或 PDF 文件。
  • 完美适配：默认 16:9 比例，排版无需二次调整，直接演示。

5. 可自由编辑的pptx导出（Beta迭代中）

  • 导出图像为高还原度、背景干净的、可自由编辑图像和文字的PPT页面
  • 相关更新见 https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/issues/121

🌟和notebooklm slide deck功能对比

功能 notebooklm 本项目
页数上限 15页 无限制
二次编辑 提示词修改 框选编辑+口头编辑
素材添加 生成后无法添加 生成后自由添加
导出格式 支持导出为 PDF、（不可编辑图片）pptx 导出为PDF、(图片or可编辑)pptx
水印 免费版有水印 无水印，自由增删元素

注：随着新功能添加,对比可能过时

🔥 近期更新

  • 【2-9】：

    • 新功能
      • 支持在首页、大纲、描述卡片里面粘贴图片并立即识别，并提供更好的交互体验
      • 大纲章节手动编辑：支持手动调整页面所属章节（part）。
      • Docker 多架构：镜像支持 amd64 / arm64 构建。
      • 国际化 + 暗黑模式：新增中英文切换；支持亮色/暗色/跟随系统主题；全组件适配暗黑模式。
    • 修复与体验优化
      • 修复导出相关 500、参考文件关联时序、outline/page 数据错位、任务轮询错误项目、描述生成无限轮询、图片预览内存泄漏、批量删除部分失败处理。
      • 优化格式示例提示、HTTP 错误提示文案、Modal 关闭体验、清理旧项目 localStorage、移除首次创建项目冗余提示。
      • 若干其他优化和修复

  • 【1-4】 : v0.4.0发布：可编辑pptx导出全面升级：

    • 支持最大程度还原图片中文字的字号、颜色、加粗等样式；
    • 支持了识别表格中的文字内容；
    • 更精确的文字大小和文字位置还原逻辑
    • 优化导出工作流，大大减少了导出后背景图残留文字的现象；
    • 支持页面多选逻辑，灵活选择需要生成和导出的具体页面。
    • 详细效果和使用方法见 https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/issues/121

  • 【12-27】: 加入了对无图片模板模式的支持和较高质量的文字预设，现在可以通过纯文字描述的方式来控制ppt页面风格

🗺️ 开发计划

状态 里程碑
✅ 已完成 从想法、大纲、页面描述三种路径创建 PPT
✅ 已完成 解析文本中的 Markdown 格式图片
✅ 已完成 PPT 单页添加更多素材
✅ 已完成 PPT 单页框选区域Vibe口头编辑
✅ 已完成 素材模块: 素材生成、上传等
✅ 已完成 支持多种文件的上传+解析
✅ 已完成 支持Vibe口头调整大纲和描述
✅ 已完成 初步支持可编辑版本pptx文件导出
🔄 进行中 支持多层次、精确抠图的可编辑pptx导出
🔄 进行中 网络搜索
🔄 进行中 Agent 模式
🚍 部分 优化前端加载速度
🧭 规划中 在线播放功能
🧭 规划中 简单的动画和页面切换效果
🚍 部分 多语种支持
🏢商业版功能 用户系统

📦 使用方法

（新）使用应用模板一键部署

这是最简单的方式，无需安装docker或下载项目，创建后可直接进入应用

  1. 通过雨云一键部署和启动本应用 (新用户有15天免费使用+首充双倍政策)

  1. 敬请期待

使用 Docker Compose🐳

通过docker compose快速启动前后端服务。

如果你使用 Windows 或 macOS，请先安装 Docker Desktop，并确保 Docker 正在运行（Windows 可检查系统托盘图标；macOS 可检查菜单栏图标），然后按文档中的相同步骤操作。

提示：如果遇到问题，Windows 用户请在 Docker Desktop 设置中启用 WSL 2 后端（推荐）；同时确保端口 3000 和 5000 未被占用。

  1. 克隆代码仓库
git clone https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides
cd banana-slides
  1. 配置环境变量

创建 .env 文件（参考 .env.example）：

cp .env.example .env

编辑 .env 文件，配置必要的环境变量：

项目中大模型接口以AIHubMix平台格式为标准，推荐使用 AIHubMix(点击此处可直接访问) 获取API密钥，减小迁移成本 友情提示：谷歌nano banana pro模型接口费用较高，请注意调用成本

# AI Provider格式配置 (gemini / openai / vertex)
AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=gemini

# Gemini 格式配置（当 AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=gemini 时使用）
GOOGLE_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
GOOGLE_API_BASE=https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com
# 代理示例: https://aihubmix.com/gemini

# OpenAI 格式配置（当 AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=openai 时使用）
OPENAI_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
OPENAI_API_BASE=https://api.openai.com/v1
# 代理示例: https://aihubmix.com/v1

# Vertex AI 配置（AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=vertex）
# 需要 GCP 项目和服务账户密钥
# VERTEX_PROJECT_ID=your-gcp-project-id
# VERTEX_LOCATION=global
# GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=./gcp-service-account.json

# Lazyllm 格式配置（当 AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=lazyllm 时使用）
# 选择文本生成和图片生成使用的厂商
TEXT_MODEL_SOURCE=deepseek        # 文本生成模型厂商
IMAGE_MODEL_SOURCE=doubao         # 图片编辑模型厂商
IMAGE_CAPTION_MODEL_SOURCE=qwen   # 图片描述模型厂商

# 各厂商 API Key（只需配置你要使用的厂商）
DOUBAO_API_KEY=your-doubao-api-key            # 火山引擎/豆包
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=your-deepseek-api-key        # DeepSeek
QWEN_API_KEY=your-qwen-api-key                # 阿里云/通义千问
GLM_API_KEY=your-glm-api-key                  # 智谱 GLM
SILICONFLOW_API_KEY=your-siliconflow-api-key  # 硅基流动
SENSENOVA_API_KEY=your-sensenova-api-key      # 商汤日日新
MINIMAX_API_KEY=your-minimax-api-key          # MiniMax
...

使用新版可编辑导出配置方法，获得更好的可编辑导出效果: 需在百度智能云平台（点击此处进入）中获取API KEY，填写在.env文件中的BAIDU_API_KEY字段（有充足的免费使用额度）。详见https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides/issues/121 中的说明

Google Cloud Vertex AI 允许通过 GCP 服务账户调用 Gemini 模型，新用户可使用赠金额度。配置步骤：

  1. 前往 GCP Console，创建一个服务账户并下载 JSON 格式的密钥文件
  2. 将密钥文件保存为项目根目录下的 gcp-service-account.json
  3. 在 .env 中设置： 
    AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=vertex
VERTEX_PROJECT_ID=your-gcp-project-id
VERTEX_LOCATION=global
  4. 如果使用 Docker 部署，还需要在 docker-compose.yml 中取消相关注释，将密钥文件挂载到容器内并设置 GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS 环境变量。

gemini-3-* 系列模型要求 VERTEX_LOCATION=global

  1. 启动服务

⚡ 使用预构建镜像（推荐）

项目在 Docker Hub 提供了构建好的前端和后端镜像（同步主分支最新版本），可以跳过本地构建步骤，实现快速部署：

# 使用预构建镜像启动（无需从头构建）
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d

镜像名称：

  • anoinex/banana-slides-frontend:latest
  • anoinex/banana-slides-backend:latest

从头构建镜像

docker compose up -d

[!TIP] 如遇网络问题，可在 .env 文件中取消镜像源配置的注释, 再重新运行启动命令：

# 在 .env 文件中取消以下注释即可使用国内镜像源
DOCKER_REGISTRY=docker.1ms.run/
GHCR_REGISTRY=ghcr.nju.edu.cn/
APT_MIRROR=mirrors.aliyun.com
PYPI_INDEX_URL=https://mirrors.cloud.tencent.com/pypi/simple
NPM_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmmirror.com/
  1. 访问应用
  • 前端：http://localhost:3000
  • 后端 API：http://localhost:5000
  1. 查看日志
# 查看后端日志（最后 200 行）
docker logs --tail 200 banana-slides-backend

# 实时查看后端日志（最后 100 行）
docker logs -f --tail 100 banana-slides-backend

# 查看前端日志（最后 100 行）
docker logs --tail 100 banana-slides-frontend
  1. 停止服务
docker compose down
  1. 更新项目

使用预构建镜像（docker-compose.prod.yml）

docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d

使用本地构建（docker-compose.yml）

git pull
docker compose down
docker compose build --no-cache
docker compose up -d

注：感谢优秀开发者朋友 @ShellMonster 提供了新人部署教程，专为没有任何服务器部署经验的新手设计，可点击链接查看。

从源码部署

环境要求

  • Python 3.10 或更高版本
  • uv - Python 包管理器
  • Node.js 16+ 和 npm
  • 有效的 Google Gemini API 密钥
  • （可选）LibreOffice - 使用「PPT 翻新」功能上传 PPTX 文件时需要，用于将 PPTX 转换为 PDF。推荐先在本地将 PPTX 转为 PDF 后再上传，原因：LibreOffice 在服务端渲染时可能因缺少字体（如微软雅黑、Calibri 等）导致排版错位，且无法完整还原部分特效。上传 PDF 文件则不需要 LibreOffice。Docker 用户如仍需在容器内支持 PPTX 上传，可执行： 
    docker exec -it banana-slides-backend bash -c "apt-get update && apt-get install -y libreoffice-impress && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"

    注意：此方式安装的 LibreOffice 在容器重建后会丢失，需重新安装。

后端安装

  1. 克隆代码仓库
git clone https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides
cd banana-slides
  1. 安装 uv（如果尚未安装）
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
  1. 安装依赖

在项目根目录下运行：

uv sync

这将根据 pyproject.toml 自动安装所有依赖。

  1. 配置环境变量

复制环境变量模板：

cp .env.example .env

编辑 .env 文件，配置你的 API 密钥：

项目中大模型接口以AIHubMix平台格式为标准，推荐使用 AIHubMix 获取API密钥，减小迁移成本

# AI Provider格式配置 (gemini / openai / vertex)
AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=gemini

# Gemini 格式配置（当 AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=gemini 时使用）
GOOGLE_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
GOOGLE_API_BASE=https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com
# 代理示例: https://aihubmix.com/gemini

# OpenAI 格式配置（当 AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=openai 时使用）
OPENAI_API_KEY=your-api-key-here
OPENAI_API_BASE=https://api.openai.com/v1
# 代理示例: https://aihubmix.com/v1

# Vertex AI 配置（AI_PROVIDER_FORMAT=vertex）
# 需要 GCP 项目和服务账户密钥
# VERTEX_PROJECT_ID=your-gcp-project-id
# VERTEX_LOCATION=global
# GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=./gcp-service-account.json

# 可修改此变量来控制后端服务端口
BACKEND_PORT=5000
...

前端安装

  1. 进入前端目录
cd frontend
  1. 安装依赖
npm install
  1. 配置API地址

前端会自动连接到 http://localhost:5000 的后端服务。如需修改，请编辑 src/api/client.ts。

启动后端服务

（可选）如果本地已有重要数据，升级前建议先备份数据库：
cp backend/instance/database.db backend/instance/database.db.bak

cd backend
uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run python app.py

后端服务将在 http://localhost:5000 启动。

访问 http://localhost:5000/health 验证服务是否正常运行。

启动前端开发服务器

cd frontend
npm run dev

前端开发服务器将在 http://localhost:3000 启动。

打开浏览器访问即可使用应用。

🛠️ 技术架构

前端技术栈

  • 框架：React 18 + TypeScript
  • 构建工具：Vite 5
  • 状态管理：Zustand
  • 路由：React Router v6
  • UI组件：Tailwind CSS
  • 拖拽功能：@dnd-kit
  • 图标：Lucide React
  • HTTP客户端：Axios

后端技术栈

  • 语言：Python 3.10+
  • 框架：Flask 3.0
  • 包管理：uv
  • 数据库：SQLite + Flask-SQLAlchemy
  • AI能力：Google Gemini API
  • PPT处理：python-pptx
  • 图片处理：Pillow
  • 并发处理：ThreadPoolExecutor
  • 跨域支持：Flask-CORS

🔧 常见问题

  1. 生成页面文字有乱码，文字不清晰

    • 可选择更高分辨率的输出（openai 格式可能不支持调高分辨率，建议使用gemini格式）。根据测试，生成页面前将 1k 分辨率调整至 2k 后，文字渲染质量会显著提升。
    • 请确保在页面描述中包含具体要渲染的文字内容。

  2. 导出可编辑 ppt 效果不佳，如文字重叠、无样式等

    • 90% 情况为 API 配置出现问题。可以参考 issue 121 中的排查与解决方案。

  3. 支持免费层级的 Gemini API Key 吗？

    • 免费层级只支持文本生成，不支持图片生成。

  4. 生成内容时提示 503 错误或 Retry Error

    • 可以根据 README 中的命令查看 Docker 后端日志，定位 503 问题的详细报错，一般是模型配置不正确导致。

  5. .env 中设置了 API Key 之后，为什么不生效？

    • 运行时编辑 .env 后需要重启 Docker 容器以应用更改。
    • 如果曾在网页设置页中配置参数，会覆盖 .env 中的参数，可通过"还原默认设置"恢复为 .env 设置。
